creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
security/barnyard-sguil6, please repocopy this port to
	security/barnyard-sguil.  I just committed the three ports
	that this port works with to version 0.7.0.  Rather than repo
	to barnyard-sguil7 or leave it at barnyard-sguil6, which might
	confuse some users, I think it's better to repocopy it to
	barnyard-sguil.  Accordingly, I have just committed the
	security/sguil-sensor port upgrade with a dependency to
	security/barnyard-sguil (rather than barnyard-sguil6) and have
	requested that the committers ensure that all three ports *and*
	the repocopy are committed at the same time.
